title: 3D Bell Item
description: A texture pack that uses the bell 3d model as item instead of using the vanilla 2d texture
body:
_A texture pack that uses the bell 3d model as item instead of using the vanilla 2d texture_

**This texture pack allows you to display the Bell item in 3d using it's own model instead of using the Vanilla 2d texture**

It also displaying it in 3d on the ground, on head, in item frames or in main hand

</details>
